default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss concerns with GrowthX's engagement and determine path forward for Boost My School's content marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Boost My School expressed disappointment with lack of published content and misalignment on expectations](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [GrowthX acknowledged challenges, proposed aggressive publishing plan for next 30-60 days](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to discuss internally and decide by next Wednesday on whether to extend engagement for 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)

## Topics

### Current Engagement Status and Concerns

  - [2.5 months into 3-month engagement with no published content](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Misalignment on expectations for Jimmy's involvement and point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Trust eroded due to quality issues and lack of tangible results](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Boost My School questioning if timing is right given other priorities](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### GrowthX's Explanation and Proposal

  - [Admitted quality issues early on, but claim to have made improvements](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [20+ articles ready to publish, 3,700 potential content ideas generated](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Proposed aggressive 30-60 day push to publish content and demonstrate value](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Offered to extend engagement by 30 days beyond Jan 20th at same price](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### Boost My School's Perspective

  - [Open to continuing but need concrete metrics and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Want to see published content and results by \~Feb 5th if extended](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Considering pause rather than permanent stop to engagement](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

### Resource Allocation and Pricing

  - [GrowthX: Boost My School is their smallest engagement, priced below sustainable level](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Kyle (20 years experience) stepped in to help, not originally planned](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [GrowthX can't offer same pricing if re-engaged in future](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Boost My School to discuss internally and decide on 30-day extension by next Wednesday (Jan 17th)](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [If extended, set concrete metrics and expectations for mid-February](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up with detailed plan to regain trust if continued](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Regardless of decision, GrowthX to publish existing content and provide access to keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/TTm1xUqbLRtXFkvm-DzcJwxnkdjbKLJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

action_items.description: Sync with Hudson on GrowthX engagement extension decision by Wed next week
Sync with Holman on GrowthX engagement extension decision by Wed next week
Prepare concrete expectations for Hudson's role in ensuring GrowthX engagement success
Regroup with GrowthX team, create strong plan to regain BoostMySchool's trust if they continue
